Query: SELECT t0.DESCRICAO AS CFOP_DESCRICAO, t1.CFOP AS ITEM_NF_CFOP, t1.QTDE AS ITEM_NF_QTDE, t1.VAL_ITEM AS ITEM_NF_VAL_ITEM, t2.NUM_NF AS NF_MODELO1_NUM_NF, t2.DAT_EMISSAO AS NF_MODELO1_DAT_EMISSAO, t2.CODIGO AS NF_MODELO1_CODIGO, t2.NOME AS NF_MODELO1_NOME, t2.NUM_CPF_CNPJ AS NF_MODELO1_NUM_CPF_CNPJ, t2.VAL_TOTAL AS NF_MODELO1_VAL_TOTAL FROM CFOP t0 LEFT JOIN NATUREZA_OPERACAO t3 ON t3.NATUREZA_OPERACAO_ID = t0.NATUREZA_OPERACAO_ID LEFT JOIN NF_MODELO1 t2 ON t2.NATUREZA_OPERACAO_ID = t3.NATUREZA_OPERACAO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_NF t1 ON t1.EMPRESA_ID = t2.EMPRESA_ID WHERE t2.DAT_EMISSAO BETWEEN @dataInicial AND @dataFinal AND t1.EMPRESA_ID = @empresa_id
